pi_items.source: Task specification and WooCommerce permalink configuration. Verified against WooCommerce documentation which confirms custom category bases can be configured in Settings > Permalinks > Optional section. The value 'collection' is a valid custom choice specified by the task creator.

Task specification and WooCommerce permalink configuration. Verified against WooCommerce documentation which confirms custom tag bases can be configured in Settings > Permalinks > Optional section. The value 'labeled' is a valid custom choice specified by the task creator.

WooCommerce official documentation (woocommerce.com/document/permalinks/). Verified that '/shop/' is the default shop base used in the 'Shop base with category' product permalink option. Documentation states: 'Shop base with category will use the shop page name first, then add the product category name (e.g. yourdomain.com/shop/hoodies/hoodie-with-logo)'.

WooCommerce official documentation and verifier.py code analysis. Verified that '%product_cat%' is the official WooCommerce placeholder tag for product category in product permalink structures. The task setup script and verifier check for this exact placeholder in the product_base field.

privileged_info_summary: The task optimizes WooCommerce URL structure by configuring permalink settings. All metadata claims are verified: the expected category base 'collection' and tag base 'labeled' are valid custom configuration values that can be set in WordPress Settings > Permalinks > Optional section; the product structure parts '/shop/' and '%product_cat%' are verified WooCommerce components used in the 'Shop base with category' product permalink option, as confirmed by official WooCommerce documentation. The task resets permalinks to defaults before execution to prevent gaming, then verifies that category_base, tag_base, and product_base fields in the woocommerce_permalinks WordPress option are correctly set.
